prose:
**Benzaldehyde Fukui reactivity result — computed.**

**Method used:** DFT tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**) with chemkit’s `fukui-reactivity` task / DFT backend; Mulliken partial charges from PySCF were used for the finite-difference Fukui indices. Geometry: user-supplied XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz`, used as the input geometry. Environment: **gas phase** (`solvent: null`). Charge/multiplicity for the neutral parent: **0 / 1**; cation state: **+1 / 2**; anion state: **−1 / 2**.

**Headline result:** most electrophilic site = atom **3** (1-based), **C**, with **f+ = 0.39938965**. Most nucleophilic site = atom **1** (1-based), **O**, with **f− = 0.23839906**.

Per-atom Fukui results from the tool:

| atom | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.37884472 | 0.23839906 | 0.30862189 | 0.14044566 |
| 2 | C | -0.35166794 | -0.0070527759 | -0.17936036 | -0.34461516 |
| 3 | C | 0.39938965 | 0.036754119 | 0.21807188 | 0.36263553 |
| 4 | C | 0.21161749 | 0.083317813 | 0.14746765 | 0.12829968 |
| 5 | C | 0.33721989 | 0.053709655 | 0.19546477 | 0.28351024 |
| 6 | C | 0.28475602 | -0.0023209662 | 0.14121753 | 0.28707699 |
| 7 | C | 0.27923467 | 0.058253155 | 0.16874391 | 0.22098151 |
| 8 | C | 0.35870964 | 0.082353671 | 0.22053166 | 0.27635597 |
| 9 | H | -0.11586238 | 0.060314591 | -0.027773894 | -0.17617697 |
| 10 | H | -0.20260655 | 0.05868656 | -0.071959997 | -0.26129311 |
| 11 | H | -0.12695921 | 0.074199719 | -0.026379745 | -0.20115893 |
| 12 | H | -0.1340356 | 0.066010688 | -0.034012454 | -0.20004628 |
| 13 | H | -0.13691069 | 0.071541633 | -0.03268453 | -0.20845233 |
| 14 | H | -0.18172971 | 0.12583308 | -0.027948317 | -0.30756279 |

**Integrity / convergence information returned:** `integrity.trustworthy = true`, `integrity.status = ok`. The tool did not return a separate `warnings` array. Integrity checks returned by the engine were:
- `sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)`
- `common header present`

**Reproducibility artifacts returned by the tool:**
- Plot: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/argo_gpt-5.5/20260704-050458_benzaldehyde_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`
- CLI invocation reported by chemkit: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpo7m71_40/live.json`
- A live `.out` log path was not included in the tool result I received, so I cannot report a path without fabricating one.
